advice.summary: You are currently in the base training phase, focusing on building endurance. Your recent sessions show a good mix of running and weight training.
advice.focus: Continue to incorporate easy runs and quality workouts to build your aerobic base.
advice.nextSession: Plan for an easy run of around 8-10 km at a comfortable pace to maintain consistency.
advice.caution: Monitor your heart rate during workouts to avoid overtraining, especially after high-intensity sessions.
